ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health statistic record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year for which the data is recorded */,
  "unit_measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit measure for the health statistic */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group to which the statistic applies */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex to which the statistic applies */,
  "value" REAL /* The recorded value of the health statistic */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health issue */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic information */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the recorded value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_unit_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_measure_id") REFERENCES unit_measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_demo_id FOREIGN KEY ("demo_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES health_issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year in which health statistics were recorded */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is the most recent year for which data is available */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit measure */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the unit measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Starting age of the age group */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* Ending age of the age group */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex category */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sex category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last user login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health statistic being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistic */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES health_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, private, public) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "is_reliable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method is considered reliable */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health issue */,
  "issue_name" TEXT /* Name of the health issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health issue */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the health issue (e.g., chronic, infectious) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the health issue */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the health issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the individual */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the demographic entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id")
)
